query:
SELECT
                sc.name,
                sc.source_type,
                iw.watermark_value,
                iw.last_successful_run,
                iw.last_attempt,
                iw.last_error,
                iw.items_collected_last_run
            FROM config.source_configs sc
            LEFT JOIN activity.ingestion_watermarks iw
                ON sc.name = iw.source_name
            WHERE sc.enabled = true
            ORDER BY sc.name
